tagline.en: GRAFFITI 101 is an Arts workshop project founded by Montreal-based multidisciplinary artist danté.

mission.en: We aim to share the gift of Graffiti-based art mediums and creative expression with the next generation, through safe, educational and engaging workshops.

vision.en: To promote an inclusive, accessible, and judgment-free environment for artists of all ages and skill levels to explore.

bio.en:
Danté is a multidisciplinary artist whose work explores graffiti, abstract art, and unconventional techniques. Working with non-traditional surfaces, his practice is rooted in self-expression, experimentation, and spontaneity.
Through both his artwork and workshops, Danté aims to encourage creativity, curiosity, and authentic self-expression in ways that feel engaging, approachable, and accessible to artists of all levels.

intro.en: Feel free to contact us for all inquiries, and we will get back to you as soon as possible!

Graffiti 101 is a structured, bilingual creative-arts program designed for schools, community centres, and youth organizations. We turn Montreal's signature visual culture into hands-on educational programming — safe, inclusive, and grant-fundable.
intro.fr: Graffiti 101 est un programme d'arts créatifs structuré et bilingue, conçu pour les écoles, les maisons de jeunes et les organismes communautaires. Nous transformons la culture visuelle emblématique de Montréal en programmation éducative concrète — sécuritaire, inclusive et admissible aux subventions.

intro.en: From a first-timer's introduction to private coaching for working writers — pricing in Canadian dollars, materials always included.
intro.fr: De l'introduction pour débutants au coaching privé pour artistes établis — prix en dollars canadiens, matériel toujours inclus.
